\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
2D‑periodic homogeneous 3D Green\textquotesingle{}s function with Ewald acceleration. 

Key responsibilities\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Manage lattice/reciprocal vectors and Bloch vector projection into the periodic plane ({\ttfamily To\+Plane}).
\item Perform Ewald‑split evaluations of the scalar kernel {\ttfamily G} and its source‑gradient {\ttfamily grad\textquotesingle{}G} (both smoothed and unsmoothed variants).
\item Provide RWG‑weighted integrals for RHS/post processing (delta, kappa) and same‑triangle batched assembly helpers. 
\end{DoxyItemize}
